entries.decisao: Sprint 2 uses appetite L (2-3 meses) with 3 sequential sprints
entries.motivo: Sprint 1 MVP proved concept; Sprint 2-4 expands to dynamic analysis + observability. Total 6-8 weeks fits appetite L
alternativas_consideradas: Appetite M (3-6 weeks) — would cut Observability/RUM, less valuable
Appetite S — impossible, too many features

entries.decisao: Lighthouse: Browser Automation (Lighthouse CI) vs API calls (WebPageTest)
entries.motivo: Real performance metrics (actual FCP/LCP/CLS) vs synthetic data. Browser automation captures true user experience
alternativas_consideradas: WebPageTest API — cost, rate limiting, external dependency
Chrome DevTools Protocol direct — lower-level, more complex
entries.appetite_impacto: Requires Chrome/Chromium (~150MB), ~5-8s per run. Acceptable for CI

entries.decisao: Bundle: Webpack-bundle-analyzer + custom tree-shaking vs source-map-explorer
entries.motivo: Webpack-bundle-analyzer: treemap visualization + chunk breakdown. Custom AST detects unused exports webpack misses
alternativas_consideradas: source-map-explorer — requires source maps, no unused code detection
Rollup only — most projects use webpack
entries.appetite_impacto: Webpack-focused (v2.2), Vite support deferred to Sprint 3

entries.decisao: React Profiler: Dual AST injection (static) + Runtime test (dynamic)
entries.motivo: Static catches all components; Runtime captures actual render times. Both needed for comprehensive analysis
alternativas_consideradas: Static only — misses runtime anomalies, false negatives
Runtime only — requires test environment, slow, misses components
entries.appetite_impacto: Requires Jest test environment; Sprint 2.2 does static, Sprint 3 adds runtime

entries.decisao: Database: Hybrid regex + ORM parser (Prisma, TypeORM, Sequelize)
entries.motivo: 80% of N+1 issues caught by regex (loop + query). ORM hints catch remaining 20%
entries.appetite_impacto: Fast + accurate; extensible for advanced patterns in Sprint 3

entries.motivo: Lighthouse is foundation; Bundle/React/Database can parallel after 2.1 checkpoint
alternativas_consideradas: All parallel — risk of integration issues
Sequential — too slow, 16 days instead of 11
entries.appetite_impacto: Finish Sprint 2 in ~11 days with parallelization

entries.decisao: Sprint 2-4 stops before CI/CD enforcement; Sprint 4.2 is integration guide only
entries.motivo: CI/CD enforcement (block deploy if score < threshold) requires extensive testing. Appetite L allows documentation guide; implementation deferred
alternativas_consideradas: Include CI/CD enforcement in Sprint 4 — adds 1-2 weeks
Skip entirely — valuable for user experience, should document path
entries.appetite_impacto: Saves ~10 hours, includes roadmap for future
